name: Cheng-du Tender Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken into 1-inch squares.
2. Heat oil in a wok and stir fry the chicken over high heat for 2 minutes.
3. Add minced chili and Chili Nam Yuey, stir frying for a few seconds.
4. Add wine, minced ginger, salt, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add hot soup stock. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the cornstarch paste and spring onion. Mix thoroughly.
7. Remove from heat and serve over cooked pea shoots garnished on a plate.
8. Cook pea shoots in boiling water before using.
From The Chinese Regional Cuisine Series, Szechuan Cooking.
